collider_contract: root sphere or short vertical capsule covers central body only; side parts and hover marker do not define navigation size or ground contact

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Ground
socket_plan.purpose: bottom-center pivot and hover height reference; not a foot contact

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Mouth
socket_plan.purpose: mouth-equivalent casting face on the front core

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_AttackOrigin
socket_plan.purpose: projectile and beam origin; visibly in front of the core

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Cast
socket_plan.purpose: charge/release VFX origin tied to the same front core

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_WeakPoint
socket_plan.purpose: top weak core exposed during stagger or cast recovery

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Back
socket_plan.purpose: rear support socket for capes, fins, back plates, or status VFX

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Head
socket_plan.purpose: optional top mask, crest, or antenna swap; not a humanoid head

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_LeftHand
socket_plan.purpose: left side-part socket for shield, winglet, or spell focus

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_RightHand
socket_plan.purpose: right side-part socket for shield, winglet, or spell focus

minimum_animation_clips.name: idle_loop
minimum_animation_clips.notes: slow hover bob; ground socket stays fixed and body never touches ground

minimum_animation_clips.name: move_loop
minimum_animation_clips.notes: drift loop with body lean and side-part lag

minimum_animation_clips.name: turn_in_place
minimum_animation_clips.notes: rotate around SOCKET_Ground while front core remains readable

minimum_animation_clips.name: attack_a
minimum_animation_clips.notes: short projectile: 10f charge, release from SOCKET_AttackOrigin, 12f recoil

minimum_animation_clips.name: attack_b
minimum_animation_clips.notes: long cast or radial pulse: clear charge, release, and recovery phases

minimum_animation_clips.name: hit_light
minimum_animation_clips.notes: small body wobble; side parts overshoot and settle

minimum_animation_clips.name: stagger
minimum_animation_clips.notes: top weak core exposed; casting disabled

minimum_animation_clips.name: death
minimum_animation_clips.notes: body collapses downward into dissipating fragments without gore

minimum_animation_clips.name: spawn
minimum_animation_clips.notes: appears from hover anchor, then lifts into idle clearance
